headline: Oil prices fall to around $100 after Trump indicates war could end in weeks
summary: Crude prices fell Wednesday as President Donald Trump signaled a willingness to exit the Iran war even as the Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed.

headline: Stocks are higher to start the month as optimism around Iran war ending grows: Live updates
summary: Stocks rose on Wednesday, while oil prices declined to start the month, as hope grew that an end to the U.S.-Iran war was on the horizon.

headline: Assessing Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Why Marathon Petroleum is on investors’ radar Marathon Petroleum (MPC) has drawn attention after a strong share price move, with the stock up around 24% over the past month and roughly 50% in the past 3 months, prompting closer scrutiny of its valuation. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum. That surge in the past month sits on top of a much longer run, with a 1 year total shareholder return of 71.88% and a 5 year total shareholder return above 4x. This suggests momentum has been...
